compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDLINE T6, CLOUDLINE S6, AIRLIFT S6
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Molex to UIS adapter (sold separately) for older Molex-connector fan models
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature/humidity-triggered speed adjustment, schedule, cycle, timer, grow-cycle programming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: 4 independent device ports; WiFi (2.4 GHz) plus Bluetooth for remote app access; otherwise identical ecosystem compatibility to base Controller 69; no VPD triggers (Pro/Pro+ only)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDRAY A4, CLOUDRAY S6, CLOUDLIFT S4
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature/humidity-triggered speed adjustment, schedule, cycle, timer, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Native UIS connection; WiFi enables remote control from outside grow room

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: IONBOARD S44, IONBEAM S16, IONFRAME EVO6
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, sunrise/sunset ramp, cycle, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Native UIS; daisy-chain adapter for IONBEAM bars; WiFi enables remote scheduling and monitoring

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: UIS Lighting Adapter Type A (self-branded driver) or Type B (Moso/Meanwell driver)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Type A adapter for self-branded driver models; Type B for Moso/Meanwell driver models; adapter must be daisy-chained from a powered UIS device; compatible with Controller 69 WiFi confirmed by manufacturer

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: UIS Lighting Adapter Type A (self-branded driver) or Type B (Moso/Meanwell driver)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Type A for self-branded driver versions; Type B for Moso/Meanwell driver versions

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: HLG 320R Spec FR, HLG Scorpion Diablo V2
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: UIS Lighting Adapter Type A (0-10V models) or Type B (Scorpion Diablo V2) or Type D (Inventronics driver)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: HLG 320 RSpec FR → Type A; HLG Scorpion Diablo V2 → Type B; Inventronics driver models → Type D

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Lumatek ZEUS and ATS series; relevant brand for German/European market; Type A adapter required

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: KS and P series via Type A; XS series on/off only (use UIS Control Plug)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Brightness schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered dimming, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: VS series with 0-10V dimmer port confirmed via Type A adapter

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (via UIS Control Plug, on/off only)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off schedule, temperature/humidity-triggered on/off, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only via UIS Control Plug; no dimming; light must auto-start when powered

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDFORGE T3, CLOUDFORGE T7, CLOUDFORGE H2
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Humidity-triggered on/off, schedule, cycle, timer, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Native UIS connection; controller overrides onboard humidifier settings; WiFi enables remote humidity monitoring and control

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (via UIS Control Plug, on/off only)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Humidity-triggered on/off, schedule, timer, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Any brand humidifier that auto-starts when plugged in; on/off control only; max 1800W; Pro/Pro+ recommended for Buffer feature to prevent short-cycling

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (via UIS Control Plug, on/off only)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Humidity-triggered on/off, schedule, timer, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Any brand that auto-starts when plugged in; on/off only; max 1800W; Pro/Pro+ Buffer setting recommended to prevent short-cycling

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: AC outlet (via UIS Control Plug, on/off only)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer/schedule-triggered on/off, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 generator must auto-start when plugged in; no CO2 level sensing on Controller 69 WiFi (use timer/schedule triggers); WiFi enables remote scheduling; confirmed by user community

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature-triggered on/off, schedule, timer, remote access via WiFi
compatible_devices.notes: Native UIS connection; AC Infinity warns against using UIS Control Plug with third-party heaters due to fire risk; WiFi enables remote temperature monitoring and control
